description.en: DBSCAN changed clustering by asking where data are dense rather than how many clusters should be declared in advance. It grows clusters from core points, connects density-reachable neighborhoods, and labels sparse points as noise, making it useful for irregular spatial patterns.
description.zh: DBSCAN 改变聚类方式：它询问数据哪里足够密集，而不是预先指定有多少簇。它从核心点生长簇，连接密度可达邻域，并把稀疏点标为噪声，因此适合不规则空间模式。

html.en: Many clustering methods preferred round clusters and required the number of clusters before analysis.
html.zh: 许多聚类方法偏好圆形簇，并要求分析前指定簇数量。

html.en: A point with enough neighbors within epsilon is a core point; clusters expand through chains of density reachability.
html.zh: 如果一个点在 epsilon 范围内有足够邻居，它就是核心点；簇通过密度可达链条扩展。

html.en: Experts generally treat DBSCAN as a standard density-based clustering method, especially for spatial data and irregular cluster shapes. Its long-term legacy is the core-border-noise vocabulary that made outlier handling and arbitrary-shape clusters practical.
html.zh: 专家通常把 DBSCAN 视为标准的基于密度聚类方法，尤其适用于空间数据和不规则簇形状。它的长期影响在于核心点、边界点和噪声点的语言让异常处理和任意形状簇变得实用。

method.en: Density reachability with epsilon and MinPts
method.zh: 基于 epsilon 与 MinPts 的密度可达

material.en: KDD 1996 paper and later density-clustering references
material.zh: KDD 1996 论文与后续密度聚类资料

demo.en: Grow clusters from core points and mark noise
demo.zh: 从核心点生长簇并标记噪声

text.en: A point with enough neighbors in an epsilon radius.
text.zh: epsilon 半径内邻居足够多的点。

text.en: Clusters grow by connecting dense neighborhoods.
text.zh: 簇通过连接密集邻域生长。

text.en: Sparse points can remain outside all clusters.
text.zh: 稀疏点可以不属于任何簇。

title.en: A density-based algorithm for discovering clusters
title.zh: 一种发现簇的基于密度的算法

description.en: Original KDD paper introducing DBSCAN's density reachability and noise-aware clustering.
description.zh: KDD 原始论文：介绍 DBSCAN 的密度可达与噪声感知聚类。

license.en: Reference link only; verify source rights before reuse.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；复用前需核验来源权利。

label.en: A density-based algorithm for discovering clusters
label.zh: 一种发现簇的基于密度的算法
